positive: A stylized and vibrant portrait of a mythical forest spirit, blending elements of bioluminescent flora and ethereal, flowing drapery. The spirit is depicted in a graceful, dynamic pose, centered within the frame. The style should be neo-Art Nouveau meets modern graphic illustration, utilizing thick, clean outlines and flat areas of color with subtle gradient accents. Use a limited, high-contrast palette dominated by deep indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and brilliant turquoise pops. The composition should favor strong silhouettes and negative space, making it perfect for repeat tiling or large apparel prints. Overhead rim lighting dramatically highlights the flowing hair and intricate natural elements.
negative: blur, out of focus, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, low detail, realistic photo, grayscale, cartoon, childish
